THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALDERILLA, JESUS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1288 MISSION STREET #402, S.F. $1,150.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,150.00, LEASE FORFEITED, AS LONG AS DEFENDANT MAKES TIMELY PAYMENTS, MAINTAINS CURRENT MONTHLY RENT AND OBEYS ALL TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE STIPULATION, THE STAY OF EXECUTION SHALL REMAIN IN EFFECT. IF THE DEFT MAKES ALL PAYMENTS, THEN PLTF WILL S/A THIS JUDGMENT AND DISMISS.
